title: Opening for Store Manager at Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
